injuries.name: Ron Harper Jr.
injuries.description: Apr 20: Harper is probable for Game 2 on Tuesday versus the 76ers due to a right ankle sprain, per Taylor Snow of the Celtics' official site.

injuries.name: Mark Williams
injuries.description: Apr 20: Williams (foot) won't play in Sunday's game against Oklahoma City, Clemente Almanza of USA Today reports.

injuries.name: Jordan Goodwin
injuries.description: Apr 19: Goodwin has been ruled out for the rest of Game 1 against the Thunder on Sunday due to left calf soreness, Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic reports.
